title: Fig. 3 in Efficacy of azithromycin combined with compounded atovaquone in treating babesiosis in giant pandas
author: Ma, Rui
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3 The changes in Babesia sp. PCR monitoring results and their correlation with blood test parameter indicators. A Changes in Babesia sp. content detected by qPCR before, during and after the combined treatment. The x-axis represents the treatment and monitoring period, and the y-axis represents the specific values of Babesia sp. CN (copies/μl). Red and blue indicate different subjects. The correlation results between the Babesia sp. PCR detection content with: B red blood cells (RBC); C hemoglobin (HGB); D hematocrit (HCT); E creatinine (CREA); F total cholesterol (TCHOL); G calcium (Ca); H magnesium (Mg);I phosphate (P); J lactic dehydrogenase (LDH); K tetraiodothyronine (T4); L free triiodothyronine (fT3) and (M) free tetraiodothyronine (fT4). The x-axis represents the specific values of Babesia sp. CN (copies/μl), and the y-axis represents the specific values of these indicators. Red indicates a significant positive correlation, while blue indicates a significant negative correlation
